output.root_cause: Column CONVERSATIONID temporarily unavailable in upstream source DW.NLP.LLM_FUNCTION_CALL_DATA during schema rebuild on 2026-03-03
output.proposed_fix: Add source freshness test + schema contract for CONVERSATIONID column

decision_log.decision: Root cause is upstream schema change removing CONVERSATIONID
decision_log.rationale: INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS query shows CONVERSATIONID does not currently exist in DW_NLP.LLM_FUNCTION_CALL_DATA. Column was available until 2026-03-03 schema rebuild. This is a transient upstream schema issue.
alternatives_considered: Column rename — but no similarly named column found
Permission issue — but other columns accessible

tool_calls.input: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM DW_NLP.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'LLM_FUNCTION_CALL_DATA' AND COLUMN_NAME ILIKE '%CONVERSATION%'
